name: G i Fruit Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Cook fruit, sugar, and water until thick. Cool.
3. Mix flour, brown sugar, and salt. Cut in shortening until mixture resembles meal (at least 1 minute in a food processor).
4. Add oatmeal and mix well.
5. Add milk and blend.
6. Pack half the dough into greased 8-inch square pan.
7. Spread fruit mixture on top.
8. Spread remaining flour mixture over fruit.
9. Bake for 40 minutes.
10. Cool and cut into bars.
Makes about 2 dozen 1 X 2-inch bars.
